rag_rules: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks within component type or implementation annexes
Assumptions referring to component ports must be placed in valid component type scopes
generic_rules: Use valid AGREE syntax for boolean expressions and type alignment in helper declarations
Avoid generating clauses that reference AADL properties as AGREE variables
Do not convert Boolean domain values into integers unless the port is explicitly AGREE bool
Ensure range comparisons use appropriate types: bool for boolean expressions, int for integer arithmetic, real for real arithmetic
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE expressions must use visible symbols from the AADL model scope
Helper declarations should match the actual types of referenced expressions
anti_patterns: Do not reference AADL timing properties like Period or Deadline as AGREE variables
Do not generate unsafe Boolean-to-integer conversions for opaque data ports
irrelevant_topics: AADL property associations and unit tokens
Model fusion and component implementation binding locations
